Lorekeeper.function: Understands what the team is facing.

Tracker.function: Finds what does not want to be found.

Survivor.function: Stays standing when everyone else is breaking.

Medium.function: Communicates with what others cannot reach.

Tinkerer.function: Builds the tools that make impossible hunts survivable.

sharedSkills.name: Awareness
sharedSkills.use: Notice threats, anomalies, hidden movement, and ambush conditions.

sharedSkills.name: Investigation
sharedSkills.use: Search scenes, connect clues, and narrow entity possibilities.

sharedSkills.name: Stealth
sharedSkills.use: Move unseen, bypass notice, and establish ambush position.

sharedSkills.name: Survival
sharedSkills.use: Operate in harsh environments and read terrain or tracks.

sharedSkills.name: Endurance
sharedSkills.use: Resist fatigue, bodily stress, and cumulative pressure.

sharedSkills.name: Composure
sharedSkills.use: Resist fear, panic, and mental collapse under supernatural stress.

sharedSkills.name: Occult Knowledge
sharedSkills.use: Recognize rituals, supernatural signs, and likely weaknesses.

sharedSkills.name: Ritual Basics
sharedSkills.use: Attempt basic rituals with elevated danger and instability.

sharedSkills.name: Ritual Casting
sharedSkills.use: Perform controlled ritual work, especially for Occultists.

sharedSkills.name: Binding
sharedSkills.use: Restrict, contain, or pin down supernatural entities.

sharedSkills.name: Warding
sharedSkills.use: Create barriers, circles, protections, and anti-entity thresholds.

sharedSkills.name: Melee Combat
sharedSkills.use: Resolve close violence, control, and finishing pressure.

sharedSkills.name: Firearms
sharedSkills.use: Deliver precise ranged attacks and target weaknesses at distance.

sharedSkills.name: Tinkering
sharedSkills.use: Build traps, modify gear, and create anti-entity tools.

sharedSkills.name: Spirit Communication
sharedSkills.use: Speak to spirits for information, leverage, or release.

sharedSkills.name: Insight
sharedSkills.use: Read motives, lies, emotional fractures, and hidden pressure.

spells.effect: Block entry / crossing

spells.name: Exorcist's Litany
spells.effect: Drive possessor from host

spells.name: Consecrate Ground
spells.effect: Sanctify room or site

spells.name: Seal the Threshold
spells.effect: Close breach, gate, or layered path

spells.name: Curse Severance
spells.effect: Break active hex or knot

spells.name: Ashen Burden
spells.effect: Target suffers -1 movement / pursuit

spells.name: Black Thread
spells.effect: Track target by emotional pull

spells.name: Hunger Bell

spells.name: Saint's Breath
spells.effect: Ally ignores 1 fear setback

spells.name: Hunter's Oath
spells.effect: One weapon gains anti-entity edge

spells.name: Mercy Ward
spells.effect: Protect host / civilian from possession spike

spells.name: Vessel Override
spells.cost: 3 strain and 1 affliction mark | Major action | Components: Blood signature, holy or infernal catalyst
spells.effect: Force yourself or another Warden to seize control of a shared host-body moment.

spells.name: Soul Pin
spells.cost: 3 strain and 1 corruption mark | 10 minutes | Components: Nail, bone, blooded sigil, true name fragment
spells.effect: Nail a spirit, demon, or escaping manifestation to its current anchor for one final exchange.

spells.name: Black Gate Petition
spells.cost: 3 strain plus narrative cost | 20 minutes | Components: Rare catalyst, anchor site, sacrifice or equivalent cost
spells.effect: Ask an outer or infernal force for a specific answer, location, or opening at terrible cost.

spells.name: Echo Reconstruction
spells.effect: Replay the emotional shape of a scene long enough to ask one precise question.

spells.name: Threshold Lattice
spells.effect: Grid a doorway or hall against repeated crossings.

spells.name: Witness Thread
spells.effect: Tie two clues together and test whether they share an anchor.

spells.name: Bone Rattle
spells.effect: Shake dead tissue, bones, or remains into brief agitation or response.

spells.name: Relic Stabilization
spells.effect: Stop a dangerous relic from cascading for one scene.

spells.name: Bleed the Sigil
spells.effect: Turn an enemy ward against the one who wrote it.

spells.name: Host Shelter
spells.effect: Hide a weak host from possession pressure for one scene.

spells.name: Panic Whisper
spells.effect: Inject a sudden doubt or fear spike into one marked target.

spells.name: Omen Read
spells.effect: Ask the scene for the next likely escalation if the group delays.

spells.name: Ash Trail
spells.effect: Make burned remains point toward what consumed them.

spells.name: Shroud Touch
spells.effect: Mask a living aura briefly from low-grade spirits.

spells.name: Hearth Seal
spells.effect: Make one room count as home ground against hostile entry.

spells.name: Circle of Refusal
spells.effect: Forbid bargains, names, and invitations inside the space.

spells.name: Black Candle Relay
spells.effect: Carry a ritual effect from one room to another without moving the whole circle.

spells.name: Mourner's Grace
spells.effect: Let a witness survive direct contact with a tragic spirit long enough to speak.

spells.name: Feral Quiet
spells.effect: Suppress animal noise or unnatural calling in a zone.

spells.name: Iron Tongue
spells.effect: Speak one refusal or command with supernatural force.

spells.name: Borrowed Breath
spells.effect: Keep a dying target conscious for a final question or exorcism round.

spells.name: Bell of Return
spells.effect: Call a wandering soul back to its remains, room, or witness.

spells.name: Rag-and-Flame Banishment
spells.effect: Cheap improvised banishment for lesser infestations and weak haunt clusters.

occultSchools.name: Wards
occultSchools.role: Protection, circles, thresholds, repellents, cover against spiritual or infernal intrusion.

occultSchools.name: Bindings
occultSchools.role: Containment, immobilization, host separation, circle locks, and anti-escape effects.

occultSchools.name: Veilcraft
occultSchools.role: Detection, revelation, spectral contact, brief manifestation, and navigation through hidden realities.

occultSchools.name: Evocations
occultSchools.role: Short bursts of force, heat, cold, light, or disruption used under direct pressure.

occultSchools.name: Purifications
occultSchools.role: Cleansing, exorcism support, curse suppression, relic stabilizing, and consecration.

occultSchools.name: Curses
occultSchools.role: Hexes, marks, pressure, exhaustion, dream poisoning, or targeted misfortune.

occultSchools.name: Threshold Rites
occultSchools.role: Summoning, sealing, opening, banishing, and lawful supernatural transactions.

occultSchools.name: Blood & Vessel Work
occultSchools.role: Compatibility checks, host strain, anchor transfer, forced entry, and high-risk power exchange.

bestiary.name: Vengeful Spirit (Onryo)
bestiary.abilities:
- Targeted Haunting: Ignores non-targets
- Emotional Surge: Adds +1 setback to nearby Wardens
- Manifest Strike: Can harm targets once revealed
bestiary.summonTrigger:
- Murder, betrayal, or unresolved injustice
- Disturbed remains
- Emotional anchor not resolved
bestiary.signs:
- Records: Victim tied to suspects
- Witness: Same person seen repeatedly
- Supernatural: Anger imprint
bestiary.behavior:
- Escalates over time
- Uses a focused target list
- Becomes more physical as threat rises
bestiary.effects: - Fear Aura: −1 to −3 on Will checks
bestiary.weakness:
- Remains
- Emotional resolution
bestiary.killCondition:
Must do both:
- Locate the remains through investigation
- Burn the remains or resolve the grudge
If this is not completed, the entity reforms after the scene.

bestiary.name: The Woman In Black
bestiary.abilities:
- Death Omen: When seen, mark a target; that target suffers escalating setbacks over scenes
- Silent Manifestation: Cannot be heard approaching
- Inevitable Presence: Once marked, cannot be avoided without ritual intervention
bestiary.summonTrigger:
- Appears after unresolved grief tied to children or loss
- Also appears after repeated deaths in the same location
- Anchor is usually a mourning object such as a veil, locket, or grave marker
bestiary.signs:
- Witness: “Saw her before someone died.”
- Records: Pattern of deaths after sightings
- Supernatural: Oppressive silence and temperature drop
bestiary.effects:
- Marked target suffers −2 to all rolls
- Marked target gains +1 additional setback per scene
bestiary.weakness:
- Object of mourning
- Truth of her loss uncovered
bestiary.killCondition:
Must do all of the following:
- Identify who she mourns
- Return or resolve the lost connection
- Destroy or sanctify the anchor object
If not completed, the cycle continues.

core.label: Support
core.text: Up to 2 relevant skills offset 1 setback each

roundFlow: Say what you do, how, and which Attribute applies.
Roll only when outcome is uncertain and failure matters.
Target may Dodge, Brace, or Counter once.
combatActions: Melee = Force; Firearms/precision = Prowess; rites = Will/Intellect.
Spend the moment to gain prep: +2, reduce difficulty, or hold an action.
Force vs Force/Prowess; move, pin, disarm, or create opening.
Relic, special ammo, trap trigger, first aid, ward, salt/iron/silver.
Describe how you help; +1 or remove setback. Group max +2.
reactionsDamage: Grit/Endurance: reduce damage severity by 1 tier.
Force/Prowess: negate attack and deal damage on success.
prepWinsHunts: Confirms weakness, behavior, or kill/banish method.
Salt, iron, silver, holy water, relics, wards, traps.
Cover, choke point, escape route, anchor access.
GM may add ambush, wrong weakness, damage, or escalation.
movement: Go up to Move rating / one zone / safe tactical reposition.
Move farther; take -1 next roll or expose yourself to reaction.
Move away safely; otherwise nearby threats may punish escape.
Reduce ranged/line-of-sight danger; may cost your action.
Door, lever, reload, draw item, grab evidence, help ally.
actions: Attack, full skill use, major inspection, rite, trap setup, treatment.
Assist, quick search, draw item, reload, mark clue, short exchange.
Dodge, Brace, Counter, protect ally, trigger prepared action.
Sacrifice pressure/action to stabilize, catch breath, or suppress effect.
investigation: Instinct: scene, tracks, disturbances, hidden danger.
Intellect: lore, records, symbols, patterns, weaknesses.
Charisma: witnesses, cover identity, pressure, bargaining.
Remove 1 possibility; vague clue or cost.
False lead, danger trigger, time loss, suspicion, escalation.
control: Combat stress, blood, source proximity, power use, fear/rage.
Success: control. Partial: strain/cost. Failure: GM influence.
Major action; Will or Tinkering/ritual device.
Multiple afflictions make control harder and effects combine.
quickReference.mantra: Case mantra: investigate first, prepare second, confront last. The wrong answer is more dangerous than no answer.
